parameters.query: DELETE FROM gda_competitor_cache WHERE created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days'; SELECT count(*) as remaining FROM gda_competitor_cache;
SELECT count(*) as ooda_count, max(created_at) as last_ooda FROM gda_ooda_loops;
SELECT count(*) as intel_count, max("timestamp") as last_intel FROM gda_intelligence_log;
